result.stdout:
ainglegen

Usage:
  ainglegen -p <protocolfile> <outputdir> [--namespace <my.aingle.ns:my.csharp.ns>]
  ainglegen -s <schemafile> <outputdir> [--namespace <my.aingle.ns:my.csharp.ns>]

Options:
  -h --help   Show this screen.
  --namespace Map an AIngle schema/protocol namespace to a C# namespace.
              The format is "my.aingle.namespace:my.csharp.namespace".
              May be specified multiple times to map multiple namespaces.
